text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days after the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Okay, Spe. That's it for today's training.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Okay, Spe. That's it for today's training.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Whoa, is it that late already?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's been easily distracted lately. Curious, I look in the
direction she was staring.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... One more!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You're worried about her, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You're worried about her, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. she's working so hard for her next race, and that's great and
all... but...
choice_data_list: She looks like she's being too hard on herself...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? You think so too?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, in all her recent races, she's seemed so... constrained. I don't
think she's having fun out there.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, in all her recent races, she's seemed so... constrained. I don't
think she's having fun out there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
U-um... Could I stick around for a little longer? I wanna join Suzuka
for her training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Approaching a racer from another team might be overstepping, but...
I'm honestly feeling worried about her too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Approaching a racer from another team might be overstepping, but...
I'm honestly feeling worried about her too.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I'll go with you. Come on, let's go.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I'll go with you. Come on, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew! Thanks for partner running with me!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Sorry to bother you out of nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No, it was actually very helpful.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We may be on different teams, but I'm glad we can still run together if
we happen to stay behind after classes. Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, Suzuka, do you remember the first time we met? You know, how I
screamed just seeing you run?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
At the time, I was actually really nervous about having left Hokkaido.
I started wondering if I could truly make it here, to be honest.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Just then, I saw you running with a smile on your face, and all my fears
were blown away! I remember thinking Tracen must be super fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But recently, I've noticed that you... don't smile as much as before.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I felt the same way at your debut race. You looked so delighted
crossing the finish line. What happened?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I felt the same way at your debut race. You looked so delighted
crossing the finish line. What happened?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't understand it myself. I know for a fact that I'm working hard
towards my dream.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And yet, no matter how much I chase after it, my dream feels further
and further away.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've loved running ever since I was little... The sound of my feet
hitting the ground, the wind in my face...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I've never forgotten that sensation... Even now, I'm still chasing it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Special Week, you said I blew you away with my smile, but I could say
the same to you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who's facing your dreams head-on. It's like you're a
pure, shining light, whereas I'm... I'm just...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Too much practice can lead to racers being overly hard on
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that's also a sign of just how serious she is. If she's that passionate
about running, then there must be some way to funnel that passion...
choice_data_list: Why don't you try running the way you want to run?
Why don't you try running the way you want to run?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What... do you mean?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
This probably sounds strange coming from a trainer, but try running a
lap without thinking about winning strategies or anything else.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
This probably sounds strange coming from a trainer, but try running a
lap without thinking about winning strategies or anything else.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Forget about pace for once. It's okay if you run out of stamina
partway through. So for now, just run the way you want.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Can I really do that? Just run the way I want?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Suzuka! Let's get running! No more thinking, just whooshing
ahead like vwooooom!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right. I'll give it a shot.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(The breeze feels so nice. The sound of my cleats hitting the ground
is so comforting... There's no other sounds to distract me, no one
blocking my line of sight...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (All I'm doing is running, but compared to my races...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (The view before me is so... beautiful.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Suzuka's so fast!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: More. I want to see more.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa! She's speeding up even more!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Great running, you two. So, how did that feel?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-see for yourself. We're both... absolutely drenched.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're right, but, well...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I finally saw it. It was only a glimpse... but I saw the scenery I'm after.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Sounds like you really like to run.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Sounds like you really like to run.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Running wild just gave you a glimpse of what you're running for,
right?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Running wild just gave you a glimpse of what you're running for,
right?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Your dream isn't all about victory. If you can find joy in running, I
think you'll start to see it.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Your dream isn't all about victory. If you can find joy in running, I
think you'll start to see it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Finding joy... will lead me to my dream?
choice_data_list: Run how you want to run, Suzuka!
Run how you want to run, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe... All right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days later...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay! Another day of working towards being the best racer in
Japan! We're off to the bamboo grove to collect as many bamboo
shoots as we can!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: How's that supposed to help me?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: What's up? Your team should be starting their practice soon.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: What's up? Your team should be starting their practice soon.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I've come to ask for a team transfer.
